title: Valley Peaks
short_description: Cozy first-person climbing platformer — puzzle each mountain, plant radio towers for the valley’s frogs, and explore froggy peaks on PC and Switch.
description: Embark on a cozy climbing adventure in Valley Peaks, a ribbiting first-person platformer where each mountain is like a puzzle. Install Radio Towers at the top of every ridge to connect the froggy inhabitants to the wider world, venture further into the Valley, conquer peaks and unravel mysteries!
